title: Vivi and Koza as Children
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on vivi and koza as children, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi and Koza as Children. Vivi’s childhood bond with Koza and the roots of the rebel movement give the civil war a personal face. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Don't worry, we won't kill ya!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: All we're gonna do is ransom you for money!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As if we'd just hand her over!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Guys! We'll die protect- ing vivi if we have to, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Some guards you twerps are!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Oh crap! She got away from me!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: She's headed for the ruins! Chase after her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: there were these bad grown-ups with knives trying to take vivi away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She ran away to the ruins but so did they and Kouza...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where is she? I don't see her anywhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Keep lookin'! We can't let her escape!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So this is where you were hiding'...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now be a nice little girl and stay still while I kidmap you...!

summary: This part develops vivi and koza as children and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
